introSection:
Funny Mouse is an Interpark wild mouse roller coaster located at EuroPark Milano Idroscalo in Segrate, Lombardy, Italy.

Prior to operating at EuroPark, this coaster operated at Antibes Land and travelled in Italy.
fullText:
Funny Mouse is an Interpark wild mouse roller coaster located at EuroPark Milano Idroscalo in Segrate, Lombardy, Italy.

Prior to operating at EuroPark, this coaster operated at Antibes Land and travelled in Italy.
